caption: A woman with brown skin and dark hair wears a striped button-down shirt and a black over-the-ear headset with an attached boom microphone. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a sheer yellow curtain with a blue edge. The text "Nancy Ramya" is visible in the lower left corner of her video feed. In the initial frames, she looks directly forward and speaks with her mouth slightly open. As the sequence progresses, her gaze shifts downward and she closes her mouth, transitioning into a more neutral, quiet expression. The background remains static throughout the clip, and the camera remains in a fixed medium close-up shot focused on her head and shoulders.
